module_description: Monitors CPU and hardware sensor temperatures via psutil. Alerts when any sensor reading exceeds the configured threshold.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this sensor.
hints.threads: Number of sensors to check in parallel.
hints.sensor: Sensor name (Linux thermal zone type) to read on the host. If empty, the item key is used.
hints.label: Display name shown in notifications. Falls back to the sensor name if empty.
hints.alert: Temperature threshold (°C). An alert is triggered when the sensor exceeds this value. Overrides the module-level threshold.

ui.discover_error: Could not load the list of temperature sensors
